is.t: Strengthened Senior High School Class Record

dataValidation.prompt: Do not type name of learners here. Go to INPUT DATA sheet.
Written Works' Total Highest Possible Score
Written Works' Total Highest Possible Score
Performance Tasks' Total Highest Possible Score
Then select your TRACK from the Drop-down List.
Either encode Highest Possible Score or Empty
Either encode Highest Possible Score or Empty
Then select your TRACK from the Drop-down List.
